title: GATE-2-PREP record result
objective:
Run script:
"""
runner_sha = '85b6c437bc372ab18c575ea30ab2015b882dcf5e'
runner = Path('governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py')
text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(text, str(runner), 'exec')
valid = len(runner.read_bytes()) > 50 and 'gate2_minimal_loop_trace_v1' in text
status_path = Path('governance/state/gate2_minimal_loop_runner_status.json')
status_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status_path.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'PASS' if valid else 'BLOCKED','all_valid':valid,'runner':str(runner),'bytes':len(runner.read_bytes()),'ast_parse':True,'trace_id':'gate2_minimal_loop_trace_v1','runner_sha':runner_sha,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(status_path))
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
done_ids = []
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('status') == 'DONE':
        done_ids.append(task.get('id'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-2-PREP':
        task['status'] = 'DONE' if valid else 'BLOCKED'
        task['sha'] = runner_sha
        task['record_sha_pending'] = True
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:30:00Z'
    if task.get('status') == 'WAITING_DEPENDS':
        deps = task.get('depends_on', [])
        if all(d in done_ids or d == 'GATE-2-PREP' for d in deps):
            task['status'] = 'PENDING'
pending = [task.get('id') for task in queue.get('tasks', []) if task.get('status') == 'PENDING']
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:31:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'HAS_PENDING_TASKS' if pending else 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = ('execute first PENDING task: ' + pending[0]) if pending else 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:30:00Z','id':'GATE-2-PREP','trace_id':'gate2_prep_minimal_loop_runner_repair','sha':runner_sha,'status':'done' if valid else 'blocked','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing = existing + line
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE2_PREP_RECORD_RESULT.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-2-PREP-RECORD','trace_id':'gate2_prep_record_result','status':'completed' if valid else 'blocked','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'GATE-2-PREP','recorded_sha':runner_sha,'next_pending':pending[0] if pending else None,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE2_PREP_RECORD_RESULT.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-2-PREP record result. Status: ' + ('completed' if valid else 'blocked') + '. Runner SHA: ' + runner_sha + '. Next pending: ' + (pending[0] if pending else 'none') + '. Workflow lock respected.', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
